description: Allowlist and schema definitions for Kyberion MCP server tools exposed to Cowork and other MCP clients.

tools.name: kyberion.pipeline.run
tools.description: Execute a named Kyberion pipeline by input path.
tools.notes: Only pipelines on the explicit allowlist may be run via MCP. Risky-op pipelines require approval gate.

tools.name: kyberion.knowledge.search
tools.description: Search Kyberion knowledge base (public tier by default).
tools.notes: confidential tier requires explicit project scope grant via allowed_confidential_projects.

tools.name: kyberion.mission.status
tools.description: Get the status of a Kyberion mission.

tools.name: kyberion.mission.journal
tools.description: Read the journal entries of a Kyberion mission.

tools.name: kyberion.approval.list_pending
tools.description: List pending approval requests in Kyberion.

tools.name: kyberion.approval.decide
tools.description: Submit an approval decision (approve/reject) for a pending request.
tools.notes: Two-step required: list_pending first, then decide. Operator role only.

tools.name: kyberion.audit.export
tools.description: Export the audit chain for a mission.

tools.name: kyberion.surface.cowork.deliver
tools.description: Deliver a Kyberion artifact to the Cowork workspace.

tools.name: kyberion.surface.cowork.list
tools.description: List previously delivered artifacts in the Cowork outbox.

tools.name: kyberion.audit.verify
tools.description: Verify the integrity of the Kyberion audit chain (hash-linked). Returns pass/fail for tamper detection.

tools.name: kyberion.knowledge.cowork_sync
tools.description: Bidirectional knowledge sync between Cowork work-folder artifacts and Kyberion's knowledge base. Respects 3-tier isolation.
tools.notes: Only public tier knowledge flows to Cowork. Cowork artifacts are enqueued for memory promotion, never directly written to confidential/personal.
